name: PineconeConnector
description: Connects to the Pinecone vector database. Wraps the control plane (https://api.pinecone.io — indexes, collections) and per-index data plane (vectors upsert/query/fetch/update/delete, stats, namespaces) behind a single API-key install. Auto-caches the index→host map after the first describe_index call.

install_fields.label: Pinecone API Key
install_fields.help: From Pinecone Console → API Keys. The key is sent RAW in the `Api-Key` header (NOT Authorization) on every control- and data-plane request.

install_fields.label: Environment
install_fields.help: Pinecone environment / region tag for the project (e.g. `us-east-1-aws`, `gcp-starter`). Used as a fallback when building legacy data-plane hosts.

install_fields.label: Project ID
install_fields.help: Optional Pinecone project ID. Used as a fallback to build `https://{index}-{project_id}.svc.{environment}.pinecone.io` when the control plane does not return a host.

install_fields.label: Default Index
install_fields.help: Index name used when an API call omits index_name. Leave blank to require it on every call.

install_fields.label: Default Namespace
install_fields.help: Namespace used when an API call omits namespace. Empty string targets the default namespace.

install_fields.label: Control Plane Base URL
install_fields.help: Pinecone control-plane base URL for index/collection CRUD. Leave blank to use the default.

install_fields.label: API Version
install_fields.help: Value sent as X-Pinecone-API-Version. Pin to a known-good date for stability.

install_fields.label: Rate Limit (requests/min)
install_fields.help: Soft cap on outbound requests per minute. Pinecone's serverless plan rate limit is 100/min by default.

apis.name: Install Connector
apis.description: Validates api_key + environment and marks the connector installed.

apis.name: Health Check
apis.description: Verifies Pinecone connectivity by listing indexes on the control plane.

apis.name: List Indexes
apis.description: GET /indexes — list all indexes in the Pinecone project.

apis.name: Describe Index
apis.description: GET /indexes/{name} — fetch index spec including the data-plane host. Caches host for subsequent vector calls.

apis.name: Create Index
apis.description: POST /indexes — create a serverless index with the given dimension and metric.

apis.name: Delete Index
apis.description: DELETE /indexes/{name} — permanently delete an index and all its vectors.

apis.name: Configure Index
apis.description: PATCH /indexes/{name} — change replicas / pod_type for pod-based indexes.

apis.name: List Collections
apis.description: GET /collections — list all collections (index snapshots) in the project.

apis.name: Create Collection
apis.description: POST /collections — create a collection (snapshot) from a source index.

apis.name: Upsert Vectors
apis.description: POST {host}/vectors/upsert — insert or update vectors. Auto-batches into chunks of 100.

apis.name: Query Vectors
apis.description: POST {host}/query — nearest-neighbor search on the data plane.

apis.name: Fetch Vectors
apis.description: GET {host}/vectors/fetch — fetch one or more vectors by ID.

apis.name: Delete Vectors
apis.description: POST {host}/vectors/delete — delete by ID list, or all vectors in a namespace when delete_all=true.

apis.name: Update Vector
apis.description: POST {host}/vectors/update — partial update of a single vector (values and/or metadata).

apis.name: Describe Index Stats
apis.description: POST {host}/describe_index_stats — dimension, total vector count, namespaces, fullness.

apis.name: List Namespaces
apis.description: GET {host}/namespaces — list namespaces inside an index (falls back to describe_index_stats on older indexes).
